test_summary: Unabhaengiger Gate-Lauf (PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin, python3.11.15). ruff check cpe_ta tests: CLEAN. mypy --strict cpe_ta/core + cpe_ta/hal/base.py: no issues (10 files). mypy --strict cpe_ta/dashboard/data.py+models.py: no issues. pytest -m 'not hardware' -n auto --junitxml --cov: 620 passed, 0 failed, Coverage TOTAL 89%. Dashboard-Subset (app 93/data 81/models 100/runner 83) ~87% >= 80% (AC-31). pytest -m hardware: 15 skipped, 0 fail (AC-22). make verify: EXIT 0 -> Done-Gate erfuellt. GAP-1 unabhaengig nachgeprueft: test_overview_real_xml_counts liest jetzt stabile Fixture tests/dashboard/fixtures/sample-results.xml (EXPECTED_TOTAL=10/passed6/failed1/skipped2/error1); Fixture-Zaehler per eigenstaendigem ET-Parse bestaetigt (10/6/1/2/1), keine Kopplung an regeneriertes test-results.xml mehr, kein Hardcode 559/620. 6 API-Routen vorhanden (overview/domains/runs/runs-id/testbed/POST-runs+progress), CLI 'cpe-ta dashboard' Default-Host 127.0.0.1 (AC-23/28), static-Frontend ohne externe http(s)-Refs (AC-29). Produktiv-Command-Factory startet echtes pytest [python,-m,pytest,-m,markers,--junitxml] shell=False -> Run-Start real nutzbar, keine Command-Injection (AC-27/28).
